case_title: SCHOENBORN RITA VS MEANIX DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHOENBORN RITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEANIX DAVID REX MICHAEL $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $955.00, DEFTS OWE RENT FOT 3/95 BUT NOT 4/95.CT'S DECISION DOESN'T ADDRESS DEFTS' SEC DEP W/C PLTF STILL HOLD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
